---
title: "Spaceship Titanic Preprocessing"
author: "Hazem Masarani & Lam"
date: "2026-03-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Load packages
```{r}

if (!requireNamespace("tidyverse")) install.packages('tidyverse')
if (!requireNamespace("caret")) install.packages('caret')
if (!requireNamespace("leaps")) install.packages('leaps')
if (!requireNamespace("bestglm")) install.packages('bestglm')
if (!requireNamespace("MASS")) install.packages('MASS')
if (!requireNamespace("ggplot2")) install.packages('ggplot2')
if (!requireNamespace("gridExtra")) install.packages('gridExtra')
if (!requireNamespace("dplyr"))install.packages("dplyr")
if (!requireNamespace("rpart"))install.packages("rpart")

library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(leaps)
library(bestglm)
library(MASS)
library(dplyr)
library(rpart)
```

![Alt text or caption](../data_info.png)

# load files
```{r}

data <- read_csv("../data/cleaned_data.csv")
test <- read_csv("../data/cleaned_test.csv")
head(data)
head(test)

```

# Count How many passenger per Number
```{r}
combined <- bind_rows(
  dplyr::select(data, Number),
  dplyr::select(test, Number)
)

GroupNumberCountTable <- combined %>%
  group_by(Number) %>%
  summarise(GroupNumberCount = n())
GroupNumberCountTable

data <- data %>%
  left_join(dplyr::select(GroupNumberCountTable, Number, GroupNumberCount), by = "Number")

test <- test %>%
  left_join(dplyr::select(GroupNumberCountTable, Number, GroupNumberCount), by = "Number")

data$Number <- as.numeric(data$Number)
test$Number <- as.numeric(test$Number)
```

# Get the family count from the common last name of the passangers
```{r}
data <- data %>%
  mutate(LastName = str_extract(Name, "\\S+$"))

test <- test %>%
  mutate(LastName = str_extract(Name, "\\S+$"))

combined <- bind_rows(
  dplyr::select(dplyr::filter(data, !is.na(Name)), Name, LastName),
  dplyr::select(dplyr::filter(test, !is.na(Name)), Name, LastName)
)

combined <- combined %>%
  group_by(LastName) %>%
  summarise(FamilyMembersCount = n(), .groups = "drop")

# Map back to train
data <- data %>%
  left_join(dplyr::select(combined, LastName, FamilyMembersCount), by = "LastName")

# Map back to test
test <- test %>%
  left_join(dplyr::select(combined, LastName, FamilyMembersCount), by = "LastName")

data$FamilyMembersCount[is.na(data$FamilyMembersCount)] <- 0
test$FamilyMembersCount[is.na(test$FamilyMembersCount)] <- 0
```

# Add feature that count the family member if in the same cabin.
```{r}
combined <- bind_rows(
  dplyr::select(dplyr::filter(data, !is.na(Name)), Cabin, LastName),
  dplyr::select(dplyr::filter(test, !is.na(Name)), Cabin, LastName)
)

combined <- combined %>%
  group_by(Cabin, LastName) %>%
  summarise(FamilyMembersCabinCount = n(), .groups = "drop")

# Map back to train
data <- data %>%
  left_join(dplyr::select(combined, Cabin, LastName, FamilyMembersCabinCount), by = c("Cabin", "LastName"))

# Map back to test
test <- test %>%
  left_join(dplyr::select(combined, Cabin, LastName, FamilyMembersCabinCount), by = c("Cabin", "LastName"))

data$FamilyMembersCabinCount[is.na(data$FamilyMembersCabinCount)] <- 0
test$FamilyMembersCabinCount[is.na(test$FamilyMembersCabinCount)] <- 0
```


# Name flag is 1 if name not NA
```{r}
data$NameFlag <- ifelse(is.na(data$Name), 0, 1)
test$NameFlag <- ifelse(is.na(test$Name), 0, 1)
```

# Cabin Mid flag
```{r}
data$CabinMidFlag <- ifelse(
  data$Cabin_num >= 275 & data$Cabin_num <= 400,
  1, 0
)

test$CabinMidFlag <- ifelse(
  test$Cabin_num >= 275 & test$Cabin_num <= 400,
  1, 0
)
```


# Convert class to one hot
```{r}
summary(data)
```


```{r}
# Home planet
unique(data$HomePlanet)

# Train
dummies <- model.matrix(~ HomePlanet - 1, data = data)
data <- cbind(data, dummies)

# Test
dummies_test <- model.matrix(~ HomePlanet - 1, data = test)
test <- cbind(test, dummies_test)
```

```{r}
# Destination
unique(data$Destination)

# Train
dummies <- model.matrix(~ Destination - 1, data = data)
data <- cbind(data, dummies)

# Test
dummies_test <- model.matrix(~ Destination - 1, data = test)
test <- cbind(test, dummies_test)
```

```{r}
# Group
data$Group <- as.factor(data$Group)
unique(data$Group)

# Train
dummies <- model.matrix(~ Group - 1, data = data)
data <- cbind(data, dummies)

# Test
test$Group <- as.factor(test$Group)
dummies_test <- model.matrix(~ Group - 1, data = test)
test <- cbind(test, dummies_test)
```

```{r}
# Deck
unique(data$Deck)

# Train
dummies <- model.matrix(~ Deck - 1, data = data)
data <- cbind(data, dummies)

# Test
dummies_test <- model.matrix(~ Deck - 1, data = test)
test <- cbind(test, dummies_test)
```

# Deck + Cabin interaction
```{r}
data$DeckG_midCabin <- ifelse(
  data$DeckG == 1 & data$CabinMidFlag == 1, 1, 0
)

data$DeckE_midCabin <- ifelse(
  data$DeckE == 1 & data$CabinMidFlag == 1, 1, 0
)

data$DeckF_midCabin <- ifelse(
  data$DeckF == 1 & data$CabinMidFlag == 1, 1, 0
)

test$DeckG_midCabin <- ifelse(
  test$DeckG == 1 & test$CabinMidFlag == 1, 1, 0
)

test$DeckE_midCabin <- ifelse(
  test$DeckE == 1 & test$CabinMidFlag == 1, 1, 0
)

test$DeckF_midCabin <- ifelse(
  test$DeckF == 1 & test$CabinMidFlag == 1, 1, 0
)
```

# Create exception feature Fix CryoSleep weakness
```{r}
data$CryoSleep_spending_conflict <- ifelse(
  data$CryoSleep == 1 & data$total_spending > 0, 1, 0
)

data$CryoSleep_spending_conflict <- ifelse(
  data$CryoSleep == 1 & data$total_spending > 0, 1, 0
)
```

# Spending is 0 but not cryosleep 
```{r}
data$NoSpending_notCryo <- ifelse(
  data$total_spending == 0 & data$CryoSleep == 0, 1, 0
)

test$NoSpending_notCryo <- ifelse(
  test$total_spending == 0 & test$CryoSleep == 0, 1, 0
)
```

```{r}
summary(data)
```

```{r}
colnames(data)
```

```{r}
head(data, n=20)
```

# Save data preprocessed
```{r}
write.csv(data, "../data/preprocessed_data.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(test, "../data/preprocessed_test.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
